auth.otpSent: Ikhodi ithunyelwe ku-{{phone}}. Ngesikhathi sokuthuthukisa, sebenzisa 000000.
auth.invalidPhone: Sicela ufake inombolo yocingo evumelekile yaseNingizimu Afrika (+27 noma 0 elandelwa izinombolo eziyisishiyagalolunye).
auth.errorNetwork: Iphutha lenethiwekhi. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumana kwakho bese uzama futhi.
auth.errorUnknown: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.errorOtpExpired: Ikhodi yokuqinisekisa iphelelwe yisikhathi. Cela ikhodi entsha.
auth.errorOtpInvalid: Le khodi ayilungile. Sicela uzame futhi.
auth.errorServer: Iseva ayikwazanga ukuqedela ukungena. Zama futhi kamuva.

consent.fullText:
QuroVita Amarekhodi Ezempilo — Isaziso Sobumfihlo (POPIA)

Ngokusebenzisa i-QuroVita uyavuma okulandelayo:

1. Amarekhodi akho ezempilo agcinwa kumaseva aseNingizimu Afrika (i-AWS Cape Town, af-south-1). Ayikho idatha eya ngaphandle kweNingizimu Afrika.

2. Wena ulawula ukuthi ubani obona amarekhodi akho. Ukwabelana kuhlala kuqala ngawe ngekhodi ye-QR oyidala. Ungakhansela ukufinyelela noma nini.

3. I-QuroVita ayithengisi futhi ayabelani ngolwazi lwakho nezinkampani zangaphandle ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacile.

4. I-QuroVita icubungula ulwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu ngokuhambelana noMthetho Wokuvikela Ulwazi Lwomuntu 4 ka-2013 (POPIA).

5. Unelungelo lokufinyelela, ukulungisa, nokucela ukususwa kolwazi lwakho lomuntu siqu. Xhumana: privacy@qurovita.co.za

6. Ngokuqhubeka uqinisekisa ukuthi ungumuntu ogulayo noma umguardian wakhe osemthethweni futhi wamukela le mithetho.

kyc.title: Ukuqinisekisa Ubunikazi
kyc.body: Ukuqinisekisa ubunikazi kuzotholakala maduze. Ungaqhubeka ukuhlola i-QuroVita phakathi nalesi sikhathi.
kyc.errorNetwork: Ayikwazanga ukufinyelela insizakalo yokuqinisekisa. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho.

home.title: Amarekhodi Ami Ezempilo
home.noRecords: Awekho amarekhodi ezempilo okwamanje. Ngemva kokuvumelanisa kokuqala, amarekhodi avela ezibhedlela noma okulayishiwe azovela lapha.
home.syncError: Ayikwazanga ukuvuselela amarekhodi. Usengabuka amakhophi agcinwe ungaxhunyiwe.

share.title: Yabelana Ngamarekhodi
share.subtitle: Khetha amarekhodi ofuna ukuwabelana nawo nekliniki. Ikhodi ye-QR iqala kuphela iseshini evikelekile — ibhundu lakho eligcwele alifaki ngaphakathi kwe-QR.
share.body: Khetha amarekhodi, bese udale ikhodi ye-QR evikelekile yekliniki ukuyiskena.
share.noRecords: Awekho amarekhodi okuyabelana ngawo. Vumelanisa ngemva kokungena usebenzisa i-Wi‑Fi noma idatha yeselula.
share.wifiDirectHint: Okungakhethwa kumabhundu angaphezu kuka-50 KB. Kudinga imvume yendawo eyengeziwe ku-Android 12+. Uma ingatholakali, uhlelo lusebenzisa indlela evikelekile ye-inthanethi.
share.qrInstructions: Cela unesi noma udokotela askene le QR ngaphakathi nesikhathi esibonisiwe.
share.revokedBody: Lesi seshini sokwabelana asisasebenzi. Dala i-QR entsha uma usadinga ukwabelana.
share.errorUnknown: Kukhona okungahambanga kahle ngesikhathi sokwabelana. Sicela uzame futhi.
share.errorCreateSession: Ayikwazanga ukuqala iseshini yokwabelana. Hlola ukuxhumana kwakho bese uzama futhi.
share.errorSessionExpired: Lesi seshini sokwabelana siphelelwe yisikhathi. Dala i-QR entsha ukuze uqhubeke.
share.errorRevokeFailed: Ayikwazanga ukukhansela iseshini kuseva. Iseshini yakho yendawo isusiwe.
share.errorNoSelection: Khetha okungenani irekhodi elilodwa ongabelana ngalo.
share.errorCrypto: Ukusethwa kwenkinobho evikelekile kuhlulekile. Vala uhlelo bese uzama futhi.
share.errorTransferFailed: Ikliniki ayikwazanga ukuthola ibhundu lakho. Zama futhi unenethiwekhi yeselula.

assistant.title: Umsizi Wezempilo
assistant.disclaimer: Lo msizi unikeza ulwazi lwezempilo olujwayelekile kuphela. Akakwazi ukuhumusha imiphumela yakho yezivivinyo, ukuxilonga izimo, ukuncoma ukwelashwa, noma ukuhlaziya amadokhumenti owalayishile. Hlala uthintane nomhlinzeki wakho wezempilo ngezinqumo zokunakekelwa kwakho.
assistant.disclaimerShort: Ulwazi olujwayelekile kuphela — akusilo iseluleko sezokwelapha.
assistant.blockedMessage: Angikwazi ukuphendula imibuzo mayelana nemiphumela yakho noma ukwelashwa, kodwa ngingachaza imiqondo ejwayelekile yezempilo noma ngiphakamise imibuzo ongayibuza udokotela wakho.
assistant.errorNetwork: Iphutha lenethiwekhi. Sicela uhlole ukuxhumana kwakho.
assistant.errorUnknown: Ayikwazanga ukuthola impendulo. Sicela uzame futhi.
assistant.errorUnauthorized: Sicela ungene futhi ukuze usebenzise umsizi.
assistant.errorRateLimit: Imilayezo eminingi kakhulu. Linda kancane bese uzama futhi.
assistant.emptyState: Buza ngomqondo wezokwelapha, ukuthi uhlobo lwezivivinyo lilinganisa njani ngokujwayelekile, noma imibuzo ongayibuza udokotela wakho.
